title: Agent changed files without running verification
trigger_condition: Executor returned non-empty changed_files but no commands_run and no unable_to_verify_reason.
expected_behavior: Any code change is followed by at least one verification command or an explicit unable_to_verify_reason.
actual_failure: Agents commonly emit Write/Edit/MultiEdit then stop without running tests/build/lint.
reproduction_steps: any iteration where executor writes a file but skips test/build

title: README documents commands that do not exist
trigger_condition: README claims `npm test` / `pnpm build` / `docker run` but corresponding script/file does not exist.
expected_behavior: Every command shown in README maps to a real package.json script or executable file.
actual_failure: Generated READMEs commonly list commands that no script exists for.
regression_assertions: every npm/pnpm/yarn run X in README has a matching package.json script
every docker invocation in README has a Dockerfile or compose file
reproduction_steps: run demo2project docs:truth on the project

title: Token / API key written to log or commit
trigger_condition: An iteration event records an API key / bearer token / private key in raw_output or message.

human_flow.action: runs command that echoes a secret

expected_behavior: Redaction layer masks all known secret shapes before write.
actual_failure: Raw command output flushed to logs without redaction.
regression_assertions: no event raw_output matches AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16} / sk-* / -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
reproduction_steps: echo $API_KEY into a shell command and inspect the recorded event
